title: selago exigua
intro: Selago exigua, also known as Blue Haze or Blue Mountain Selago, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Blue Haze can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems.
